subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call from the Crimson Tree at the heart of the Most Exalted Paradise: "God, there is no God but Him, the Sovereign..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع الندآء من السدره الحمرآء فی قطب الجنه العلیا الله لا اله الا هو المالک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love and unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @goodly deeds; actions
